Meaning.En: A worker who makes and repairs metal objects, especially by forging iron or steel; historically, a craftsman who works with metal, such as a blacksmith or goldsmith.
Meaning.Example: The blacksmith hammered the hot iron into a horseshoe.

Situation.Vi: Một người làm việc trong xưởng rèn, đúc và uốn kim loại nóng chảy.
Situation.En: A person working in a forge, heating, shaping, and joining metal components.

Situation.Vi: Thợ kim hoàn chế tác trang sức từ vàng, bạc.
Situation.En: A goldsmith or silversmith crafting jewelry and decorative items from precious metals.
